result.summary: Found several layout issues on the page: the horizontal content appears clipped on the right, and the fixed bottom navigation is overlapping the game grid.

issues.description: The top category row is cut off on the right, with the last tab only showing part of its label ('Hot Gam').
issues.suggestion: Make the category carousel fit the viewport properly or allow horizontal scrolling without clipping the last item.

issues.description: The rightmost game cards in the grid are partially off-screen and visibly cropped on the right edge.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the card grid columns, padding, or container width so all tiles are fully visible within the viewport.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation bar overlaps the content area, hiding the lower row of game tiles.
issues.suggestion: Add enough bottom padding/margin to the scrollable content or reduce the footer height so content is not obscured.
